overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a female character exploring a wide sandy beach with forested mountains and coastal buildings in the background. The character walks across the open sand, turns to survey the tropical bay, and walks back under a bright partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sandy beach approaching the water

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the water with forested mountains and a tall building visible in the distance

entered.detail: forested mountain range forming the left boundary of the bay
cluster of buildings terraced on the forested hillside
tall rectangular building standing prominently against the mountains
forested mountain range forming the right boundary of the bay
calm bay water reflecting the sky between the mountain ranges
wide expanse of light-colored sand with scattered dark patches
scattered green trees along the edge of the beach

segments.scene_description: The character walks forward across the wide sandy beach toward the calm bay water. Forested mountains frame both sides of the view, with a hillside settlement visible on the left and a tall building standing in the center distance.

events.description: character turns left and begins walking parallel to the shoreline

agents.ego_description: turning left to walk along the beach, revealing more of the hillside buildings

entered.detail: low-rise yellow building near the tree line

segments.scene_description: The character turns left and walks along the shoreline, bringing the hillside settlement and a yellow building into closer view on the left. The tall building and water shift to the right side of the frame as the camera moves laterally.

events.description: character stops and turns to face the water directly, standing still to observe the view

agents.ego_description: standing still and observing the ocean view with mountains in the distance, occasionally shifting weight

segments.scene_description: The character faces the bay directly, standing still to observe the water and distant mountains. The hillside settlement is no longer visible, while the tall building now appears on the left side of the frame against the bright sky with sun glare on the water.

events.description: character turns around 180 degrees to walk back toward the buildings and trees

agents.ego_description: walking back toward the hillside settlement and coastal trees

entered.detail: cluster of buildings terraced on the forested hillside
low-rise yellow building near the tree line
scattered green trees along the edge of the beach

segments.scene_description: The character turns around and walks back toward the inland area, with the hillside settlement and yellow building reappearing on the left. The coastal trees become prominent as the water exits the frame, and the tall building shifts to the right side of the view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a wide sandy beach that shifts from a forward approach toward the bay to a lateral exploration of the coastline before retreating inland. It begins with the character walking toward the calm water, framed by forested mountains and a distant tall building. As the character turns left to walk along the shoreline, the perspective shifts to bring a hillside settlement and a yellow building into closer view while the water moves to the right of the frame. The scene then pauses as the character faces the bay directly, capturing the sun glare on the water and the tall building against a bright sky, before turning around to head back toward the interior. Finally, the camera moves away from the coast, causing the water to exit the frame as coastal trees and the hillside settlement reappear on the left.
